spec.name: A Dust-Covered Hallway
spec.description: This hallway is covered with a thick, choking dust that rises up to obscure your light source and sting your eyes. Small marks and footprints in the dust betray the recent passage of others.

east.description: The hallway turns to the north.

west.description: You smell something peculiar over there.

up.description: A tightly spiralling stone stairway leads up.
